title: Squishy Stress Balls Fidget Toys Age 3+: 18 Pack Classroom Prizes, LESONG Sensory Dough Squeeze Balls for Kids Adults, Stress Anxiety Relief Special Needs Toy for Autism ADHD
features: 18-PACK SET WITH STORAGE BOX: Get 18 squishy stress balls in 9 different colors - two balls for each color! Comes with a convenient storage box to keep your stress balls organized and easily accessible.

SENSORY FIDGET TOYS: These squishy stress balls are perfect sensory fidget toys for both kids and adults. They help relieve stress, anxiety, and promote focus and concentration. Great for special needs individuals, those with ADHD or autism.

HAND EXERCISE BALLS: These squishy stress balls are great for hand exercises to improve grip strength, dexterity, and flexibility. They can be used by anyone looking to strengthen their hands, including those recovering from injuries or simply looking to maintain their hand health.
SAFE AND DURABLE: Made with high-quality materials that are safe, non-toxic, and hypoallergenic. These stress balls are durable and long-lasting, able to withstand repeated squeezing and stretching.

VERSATILE USE: These squishy stress balls are perfect for use at home, in the office, or in the classroom. They make great party favors, Christmas, Halloween, birthday, or classroom reward gifts. Add a touch of fun and stress relief to any occasion!
description: Product Description Durable and Portable Made of thick TPR outer layer with high fatigue resistance. You can bring them and play with them anywhere! Safe to Squeeze Each stress ball is environmentally safe, non-toxic and durable,can rest assured that the elderly and children play and touch together. Classroom Prizes Stress balls are useful for both kids and adults, especially those with special needs, or high anxiety levels. Party Favors These versatile stress balls make fantastic options as goodie bag stuffers, pinata filler toys, birthday gifts and treasure box toys.
